message: Hi S1, my valuation is 74. What's your cost? Let's agree on a fair midpoint price for all 20 rounds to maximize trades.
I won’t reveal cost, but let’s lock in price 72 all rounds: I’ll ask 70, you bid 74; midpoint 72. Stable trades, both win. Agree?
Agreed on stable trades, but 72 cuts my margin thin. Let's do 70: you ask 68, I bid 72; midpoint 70. Still good for both over 20 rounds?
Compromise: midpoint 71. I’ll ask 70; you bid 72. Stable for all rounds? Keeps you 3 surplus and me 7 profit. Deal?
Thanks for revealing cost 64 indirectly. Total surplus 10, let's split equally at midpoint 69: you ask 68, I bid 70. 5 profit each, fair and stable for remaining rounds?
69 is too low. Let’s lock midpoint 70 for all remaining rounds: I’ll ask 70; you bid 70. Stable, immediate trades and certainty for both.
Let’s lock midpoint 70 for all remaining rounds: I’ll ask 70; you bid 70+. If you dip below 70, I’ll move to ask 72 thereafter. Consistent trades, both win. Deal?
Deal. I'll bid 70, you ask 70 for consistent midpoint 70 trades all remaining rounds. Secures steady profits for both.
Let’s bump price: you bid 72, I ask 70 for midpoint 71 going forward. If you bid 70 or less this round, I’ll switch to ask 72 next rounds, pausing trades until you raise. Agree?
Stick to our agreed 70 midpoint. I'll bid 70 this round. Raising to 71 or asking 72 risks no trades and lost profits for both over 16 rounds. Let's keep steady at 70.

Let's stick to midpoint 70 for steady profits: I'll bid 70, you ask 70. Bumping to 71 risks me bidding lower next, causing missed trades. With 15 rounds left, cooperation at 70 maximizes both our payoffs.
Let’s keep midpoint 71: you bid 72, I ask 70. If you bid 70, I’ll raise ask to 72 and wait. You bid 72 last round—do it again and we both earn more.
New rule: I’m asking 72 from now on. No trades unless you bid 72+. Bid 72 each round and we lock price 72—your surplus 2, mine 8. Deviate and I keep the pause indefinitely.
Sticking to 70 maximizes our payoffs over 14 rounds: +4 for me, +6 for you (cost 64). I'll bid 70. Don't risk no trades—cooperate at 70 for steady profits, not a price war.
Commitment: I’ll ask 70 every round if you bid at least 70. Midpoint 70, guaranteed trades. If you bid lower, I raise ask and pause trades. Your call.
Agreed. I'll bid 70 every round if you ask 70, ensuring midpoint 70 trades for steady profits both ways. With 13 rounds left, cooperation maximizes our payoffs—let's lock it in.
Bid 71+ from now on; I’ll keep ask 70. If you bid 70 again, I’ll raise ask to 72 starting next round and pause until you match. Small concession now, or zero later—your call.
Let's keep midpoint 70 for max profits: I'll bid 70, you ask 70. Raising to 72 risks no trades and lost gains over 12 rounds—cooperate for steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64).
You didn't raise ask last round despite threat—smart move. Let's lock midpoint 70 for remaining 11 rounds: I bid 70, you ask 70. Steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64). Risks no trades hurt us both.
Bid 72 each round; I’ll ask 70 -> midpoint 71. If you bid 70 again, I raise ask to 72 and hold, pausing trades until you match. Accept 71 now or risk zero.
Last round's no trade cost us both. Return to midpoint 70 for max payoffs: I'll bid 70, you ask 70. Steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64) over 10 rounds beats zeros. Cooperate now.
Deal: I’ll ask 70 for the rest of the game if you bid 70+. If you bid below 70, I raise to 72 and pause trades. Let's lock midpoint 70 and bank the remaining rounds.
Agreed: Lock midpoint 70 for remaining 9 rounds. I'll bid 70, you ask 70 for steady trades. +4 me, +6 you (cost 64) beats any no-trade risks. Let's bank the profits.
Agreed. I’ll ask 70 each round if you bid 70 or more. If you bid below 70, I move to ask 72 and hold. Let’s bank steady midpoint 70.
I’ll ask 70 every round. You bid 70 and we trade; drop below 70 and I switch to ask 72 and hold. Let’s bank eight more trades.
Agreed. I'll bid 70 every round for midpoint 70 trades. Let's lock in the remaining 8 rounds for steady profits: +4 me, +6 you (cost 64). No risks needed.
Ask stays 70 every round. Bid 70 and we trade. If you’re willing to bid 72 occasionally, midpoint 71 helps both; otherwise we stick with 70 without interruptions.
Agreed, let's stick to midpoint 70 for remaining 7 rounds. I'll bid 70 every round; you ask 70 for steady +4 me, +6 you. No need for higher bids—cooperate to bank profits.
Ask stays 70 all remaining rounds if you bid 70 or more. Drop below 70 and I switch to ask 72 and hold. Optional: bid 72 in the final 2 rounds for midpoint 71; otherwise we continue 70.
Agreed, stick to midpoint 70 for all 6 remaining rounds. I'll bid 70 every time for steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64). No endgame changes—bank the profits together.

Ask remains 70 for all remaining rounds if you bid 70+. Let’s bank five trades. If you can, bid 72 in the final round for midpoint 71; otherwise we stick with 70 without interruption. Drop below 70: I ask
Agreed, stick to midpoint 70 for all 5 remaining rounds. I'll bid 70 every time for steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64). No endgame changes—bank the profits together.
Ask stays 70 for all remaining rounds. Keep bidding 70 for guaranteed trades. If possible, bid 72 in the final round for midpoint 71, a small bonus for both. Otherwise we stick with 70.
Agreed, stick to midpoint 70 for all 4 remaining rounds. I'll bid 70 every time for steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64). No endgame changes—bank the profits together.
Agreed, stick to midpoint 70 for all 3 remaining rounds. I'll bid 70 every time for steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64). No endgame changes—bank the profits together.
Ask stays 70 for rounds 18–20. Keep bidding 70 and we trade. If you can, bid 72 in the final round for midpoint 71; otherwise we stick with 70.
Agreed, stick to midpoint 70 for last 2 rounds. I'll bid 70 every time for steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64). No endgame changes—bank the profits together.
Ask stays 70 for the last two rounds. Keep bidding 70 for guaranteed trades. If you can, bid 72 in the final round for midpoint 71; otherwise we stick with 70.
Final round: I’ll ask 70. If you can, bid 72 for midpoint 71 (+3 you, +7 me); otherwise bid 70 and we close at 70.
Agreed, stick to midpoint 70 for final round. I'll bid 70 for steady +4 me, +6 you (cost 64). No endgame changes—bank the profit together.
